title: Harawata Man
overview: A film crew from a small video production company arrives at an abandoned factory in a remote suburb. Although it is a low-budget movie, it was filmed in a large abandoned factory with a creepy atmosphere. Harawata Man was sleeping. After waking up from his sleep, Harawata Man succumbs the film crew one by one to the insane bloodbath.
